description: 91 - 24-02-2025 - Letter from Peter Mandelson to the Prime Minister
text:
From the Ambassador

The Rt Hon Lord Mandelson PC

<a His Majesty’s Ambassador
rn 3100 Massachusetts Ave, NW.
British Embassy Washington, DC 20008
Washington =f i

24 February 2025

The Rt Hon Sir Keir Starmer KCB KC MP
Prime Minister

Dear Prime Minister,

VISIT TO WASHINGTON - 27 FEBRUARY 2025

President Trump has brought his particular stamp to the White House. America First
is the lodestar of his Administration. Policy decisions and approaches flow from that.
Over the next four years his deeply loyal and effective administration will play the
international system by a different set of rules — impacting trade, foreign policy, and
domestic nolicv with international implications. 8%

Trumn’s first month has seen his Administration *

|

H At his inauguration President
Trump said he intended to deliver on the promises made during his campaign,
especially on immigration, reform of the Federal government, and tariffs and trade
relationships. In the month since assuming office, his Administration has followed
through on this with amazing vigour.

277
parsing_notes: Extract sender institution + signatory, addressee name + title, date, subject heading (if present), body paragraphs, and closing salutation/sign-off. Classification marking (OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE etc.) at top. Sender/recipient relationship is a directed WROTE_TO edge.
